reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) YPF is always a good option on the road, with gasoline that lasts a long time, always clean, and a store with good food options. A safe haven for those who are far from home.

(Original)
YPF sempre é uma boa opção na estrada , gasolina de ótima validade, limpeza sempre,e uma loja com boas opções de alimentação. Um porto seguro para quem está longe de casa.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/21560828516332243/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBOE15d2h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo único malo es que no se puede pagar con tarjeta o débito.
La atención es excelente y la calidad de los combustibles es bueno.

(Translated by Google)
The only downside is that you can't pay by card or debit card.
The service is excellent and the fuel quality is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/21560828516332243/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNkpLSEhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Está en un lugar estratégico, es precario. Solo tienen nafta y gasoil común. Pero ayuda.

(Translated by Google)
It's in a strategic location, but it's precarious. They only have regular gasoline and diesel. But it helps.
